CustomField.inlineHelpText: Please fill in End User Type (Public Hospital, Private Hospital, Business Research Institute, National Research Institute or Others) with "/" and End User Level (1A, 1B, 1C, 2A, 2B, 2C, 3A, 3B, 3C, Level 1, Level 2, Level 3, or Not applicable
CustomField.label: End User Additional Information
